message:
feat(ruvector): Integrate @ruvector/edge-full with colored status line

- Add @ruvector/edge-full integration with all 6 modules:
  - edge: HNSW, Identity, Crypto
  - graph: Cypher/SPARQL/SQL
  - rvlite: SIMD vector ops
  - sona: Self-learning engine
  - dag: Workflow orchestration
  - onnx: Embeddings inference

- Add TinyDancerRouter for FastGRNN neural routing
- Add ONNX embeddings WASM wrapper
- Update intelligence exports

- New colored status line with dark/light mode:
  - Auto-detects terminal theme
  - Shows patterns, memory, trajectories, agents
  - Q-learning stats (lr%, ε%)
  - 256-color palette

- Update hooks init to generate colored statusline

Published as agentic-flow@2.0.1-alpha.32

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
